title: Sorting Subitems by multiple columns

posts.author: dobs (gal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’ve Only seen this solution around - Which is such a loop…

I have project tasks as subitems, and I want monday to group together tasks (subitems) By: Status > Date > Priority

That is to say, Group all the done subitems next to eachother, order them by their date , and then priority. then below that “done group” , group all the sub items with the status “working on it” and yada yada.

Why is this only possible with items and not sub-items ? It’s feels like such a basic feature to have…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gal,

I hear you and appreciate your feedback.

It sounds like our group-by feature is what you’re looking for here, and this is something that our product team is currently working on. Whilst I cannot confirm subitems will be included in the initial release, we aim to support most column types, so please stay tuned for more information in the near future
